overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage exploring an ancient Greek temple complex in Korinth during golden hour. The player character walks through stone-paved plazas adorned with blooming pink trees, passes classical temples with Doric columns and red banners, and explores terraced gardens with statues and vine-covered pergolas overlooking the town.

events.description: moving from behind stone wall into open temple plaza with blooming pink trees

curved stone block wall running alongside the path

tall dark green cypress trees lining the temple

segments.scene_description: The segment begins along the side of a monumental stone temple, walking past a curved stone wall. The camera moves forward along the temple precinct, transitioning from a narrow walkway into a more open plaza area with blooming trees visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: central plaza with ceremonial statue and pink blossom trees

turning toward the marble statue on a pedestal in the plaza center

person in blue tunic walking past the camera

tall marble statue of a figure on a decorated stone pedestal

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide sunlit plaza featuring a magnificent pink blossoming tree and a central marble statue on a pedestal. The camera moves through the space, passing NPCs in ancient Greek attire, with the temple now visible in the left background and mountains rising behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple entrance with monumental Doric columns

events.description: approaching the temple front with tall monumental Doric columns
ascending the temple steps and looking up at the decorated pediment

agents.ego_description: walking up the stone steps toward the temple entrance, examining the columned facade and red banners

entered.detail: covered entrance area with deep shadows between the columns
massive fluted stone columns supporting the temple roof
long red banners with white symbols hanging between columns
long red banners with white symbols hanging between columns
triangular roof section with carved stone reliefs

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the grand front of the temple, ascending the stone steps between massive Doric columns. Red banners hang from the structure, and the camera tilts up to admire the carved pediment against the blue sky, with the sun creating a warm backlight on the stone surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden terrace with hero statue and burning braziers

events.description: moving away from temple into garden area with warrior statue and burning braziers
circling around the statue base to view different angles

agents.ego_description: circling the marble statue of a warrior, observing the surrounding gardens, braziers, and distant mountains

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing near a burning brazier
person in red robes walking toward the statue

entered.detail: marble statue of a muscular warrior holding a weapon on a decorated base
stone fire bowl with flames burning
stone fire bowl with flames burning
bushes with red and purple flowers

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the temple front into a garden terrace featuring a prominent warrior statue surrounded by burning stone braziers. The camera circles the statue, revealing flowering bushes, olive trees, and NPCs tending to the fires, with the temple now visible from a different angle and mountains in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: vine-covered pergola leading to Akropolis Treasury terrace

events.description: entering vine-covered pergola walkway with dappled shade
emerging onto terrace overlooking the lower town and distant mountains

agents.ego_description: walking through the shaded pergola with hanging vines, then emerging onto a terrace with panoramic views of the town

notable_agents.action: armored guard in red cape standing on the terrace overlooking the town

entered.detail: wooden structure covered with grape vines creating dappled shade
stone building with columns labeled as Akropolis Treasury
elevated stone platform with low walls overlooking the town
panoramic view of the ancient town with buildings and pink trees below

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a vine-covered pergola with hanging red drapes, transitioning from shade to sun as the camera emerges onto the Akropolis Treasury terrace. The scene opens to a breathtaking panoramic view of the town below with pink blossoming trees, distant mountains, and an armored guard standing watch.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the secluded side of a monumental temple into a sprawling, sun-drenched sanctuary and its overlooking terraces. It begins along a narrow walkway beside a curved stone wall, moving forward as the space expands into a wide, sunlit plaza filled with blooming pink trees and marble statues. The camera then approaches the grand front of the temple, ascending stone steps between massive Doric columns and red banners before tilting up toward the carved pediment against a bright blue sky. As the view shifts away from the temple, the scene moves through a garden terrace of burning braziers and warrior statues, eventually passing under a vine-covered pergola with hanging red drapes. The movement finally emerges from the shade onto the Akropolis Treasury terrace, opening into a breathtaking panoramic view of the town and distant mountains.
